text: Here, in these bright and modern halls, I feel a quiet anticipation. The glass walls and crisp lighting of the first space invite reflection, making me aware of the boundaries between private thought and public display. Moving into the R+D exhibit, curiosity is awakened within me. The interplay of text, digital displays, and bold graphics evokes a sense of wonder about how knowledge is formed and shared. I feel both observed and observing, part of a living network of ideas.
